description:
Protect your privacy and get 20% off DeleteMe at https://joindeleteme.com/SYMBOL20

The Trump-Iran crisis is crazy and my heart goes out to everyone worried about friends, family, or what comes next. But a few days earlier, #nvidia earnings ( #nvda stock ) confirmed the start of a new phase of the AI revolution -- where AI agents like Claude Cowork by #anthropic , Perplexity Computer, and OpenClaw are changing the fundamental way we interact with technology. This is a massive moment that will make millionaires -- especially if we can be greedy when others are fearful and find the best stocks to buy now without getting distracted.

Register for NVIDIA GTC 2026 on March 16-19 and join me!
» Registration link (do this first!): https://tsy.link/gtc2026
» Jensen Huang's Keynote: https://tsy.link/gtc26-jensen-keynote
» Best Session on AI Agents: https://tsy.link/ai-agents-at-scale
» AI for Humanoid Robots: https://tsy.link/humanoid-robots

» My Top 10 Stocks for 2026: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SBs4LV0_PjA

» Podcast: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLEzjBEcw2qf3_JUdsbF7W2-OfOMgndZkZ
